vampire_beast: bears dense blood-red carved runic symbols and script etched across nearly every surface of her body, resembling deep scarred carvings as if written in blood.
tanlines: displays distinct tan lines with pale untanned areas across her chest and hips contrasting sharply against her deeply sun-bronzed body, suggesting a bikini tan line from long hours in the sun.
dirty: has a gritty, unwashed appearance with dark grime and dirt unevenly smeared and streaked across her body.
frostnip: has subtle rosy-pink flush kissing the tips and exposed extremities of her body, giving her skin a delicate cold-bitten blush as if  has just come in from freezing temperatures.
scars: carries a few faint pale silvery-pink scars tracing thin jagged lines across her lower abdomen and thigh, subtle but telling marks of past wounds healed over time.
red_orc: is covered in natural burnt-orange and rusty-red leopard-spot patterns sprawling across her body in organic clusters, giving her an exotic creature-like appearance.
green_orc: is covered in natural warm tan and sandy-brown leopard-spot patterns sprawling across her body in organic clusters, blending together like ancient reptilian camouflage markings.
silver_dunmer: has pale ashen skin with adorned with shimmering silver-white intricate swirling floral and organic patterns flowing across her chest, torso and limbs like living filigree etched naturally into her flesh.
purple_dunmer: has pale ashen skin with adorned with soft muted lavender-purple intricate swirling floral and organic patterns flowing across her chest, torso and limbs like living filigree etched naturally into her flesh.
spring_bosmer: has fair peach skin with brushed with natural soft mossy-green and pale yellow-green patches spreading organically across her torso and limbs like fresh lichen and new growth blooming across forest stone, deeply connected to the living woodland around her.
autumn_bosmer: has warm golden-bronze skin with natural amber, russet and burnt-sienna wood-elf markings that blend seamlessly with her complexion like the bark of an ancient tree, echoing the falling leaves that swirl around her.
silver_altmer: has skin with shimmering ice-blue silver feather-like branching patterns flowing elegantly across her limbs and torso, resembling delicate frost-etched filigree of High Elven arcane lineage, catching the light like moonlit engravings.
golden_altmer: has skin with warm lustrous golden feather-like branching patterns flowing elegantly across her limbs and torso, resembling intricate gilded leaf-work of High Elven noble heritage, glowing richly like sunlit embossed scripture.
dunmer_veiny: has smooth, taut skin with subtle visible veins tracing along her slender arms and hands.
dremora_dark: has visibly rough, scaly-textured skin covered in scattered blood-red runic and serpentine markings carved across her torso, abdomen and legs, with a bold dark swirling tribal design scarred into her chest.
dremora_red: has rough, leathery-textured skin bearing large deep crimson-black daedric tribal tattoos — sprawling flame and dragon-like sigils across her back, buttocks and thighs.
freckles_light: has a delicate dusting of faint soft golden-brown freckles lightly speckled across her face, shoulders and upper chest, barely visible against her smooth skin.
freckles_heavy: has dense, warm golden-brown freckles heavily concentrated on her face and chest, scattering thickly across her shoulders and upper body in rich sun-kissed clusters.
stretch_marks: has faint silvery-white stretch marks delicately streaked across her skin in subtle, natural patterns.
akaviri: has a flawless, porcelain-smooth complexion with a cool, ivory-ivory undertone and an almost lacquered, silken sheen that catches light with an impossibly refined, glass-like luminosity.
